title: Foods Remade
description: A remake of the Minecraft food item textures
body:
## Foods Remade 1.19 - 1.21.2
Foods Remade adds a new, fresh look to food items in Minecraft.

### Items
I currently textured:
- Bread (Toast)
- Apple
- Carrot

_more are already in progress._



### Native Version
It is created on 1.21 but will also work on 1.19 and above.

### Updates
I will continually update this ResourcePack, that's why there are currently not many items.
